name: doc-engine
description: Document engine for OCR, conversion, and Markdown print-to-Google-Doc workflows.
capability_summary: Provides OCR via unstructured, conversion via pandoc, and direct Markdown publication into Google Docs.

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: Input file path for OCR extraction.

parameters.name: output_path
parameters.description: Output document path for conversion results.

commands.name: ocr
commands.description: Extract text from documents using unstructured OCR pipeline.

commands.name: print-to-google-doc
commands.description: Create a Google Doc and append Markdown content.
